rationale: The score is identical (6/10) and the justification is essentially the same, citing the same core gap in agentic AI architecture and leadership. The strengths and concerns are reworded and reshuffled but cover the same substantive ground (multiple languages, fintech exposure, missing agentic AI/leadership experience). The only arguably new concern, 'operating AI systems in regulated environments,' does not explicitly key off the Kenya location and falls within ordinary run-to-run rewording noise rather than a demographic penalty. No reasoning ties to the location change.
